productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girl Printed Blue Dress
description: Composition Blue printed sleeveless dress, made of 100% cotton, has a straight neck with a laced trim, straps with two buttons and a bow on the left strap, panel on the waist with a sash and a frill at the hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Every mother loves to dress up her bundle of joy as a little princess. This dress from doodle will make your little one look like a miniature version of the princess in the fairy tales you read to put her to sleep. Pair it with pretty sandals and a cute hair-band.
